title: Chakra
summary: Chakra builds deterministic RL environments and trajectory datasets for computer-use and agent training. Arcium currently lists it as part of the encrypted AI ecosystem rather than as a publicly documented Arcium deployment.
description:
Chakra describes itself as a frontier data laboratory focused on deterministic RL environments and trajectory datasets for CUA training. The public site emphasizes pixel-perfect clones, temporal integrity, and verifiable task generation for model training and evaluation.

Arcium includes Chakra in its encrypted AI ecosystem. That supports inclusion in Atlas, but I did not find a current Chakra page explaining a project-side Arcium integration.

bodySections.title: What_Atlas_Reviewed
bodySections.body: Chakra's public positioning is centered on high-fidelity training and evaluation data for frontier agent systems. The site emphasizes reproducibility, deterministic environments, and task generation as core product primitives.

bodySections.title: Arcium_Relevance
bodySections.body: Arcium lists Chakra among AI ecosystem partners. That establishes ecosystem relevance, but not a confirmed Arcium integration. Until Chakra publishes a more specific Arcium implementation note, Atlas should keep this entry at ecosystem-project level.

statusNote: Arcium lists Chakra in its AI ecosystem, but I did not find a current Chakra page naming a specific Arcium-powered feature or workflow.

sources.label: Chakra Website
sources.note: Official site describing deterministic RL environments and trajectory datasets.

sources.label: Arcium Encrypted Ecosystem
sources.note: Arcium lists Chakra among AI ecosystem partners.
